payload.answer: This looks like a new music-listening preference. I can offer choices for how to handle it, but I won’t save anything yet.
repair_options: Add as a new preference: prefers Sonny Rollins over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening.
Keep as a separate contextual preference specifically for relaxed Sunday listening.
If an existing jazz preference already mentions Sonny Rollins or John Coltrane, ask whether this should be kept alongside it or used to clarify that context.
